---
title: "Cable"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Physical cable resource containing one or more fiber segments.

::: {.note}
Cable containers are intentionally limited. A cable can be inside an enclosure or another cable, but optical components should still reference the cable segment they physically occupy.
:::

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `resource_id` | str | Stable identifier for this shareable inventory resource. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable cable name. |
| `owner` | str | Proprietary owner of the cable. |
| `manufacturer` | str | Manufacturer of the cable. |
| `model` | str | Model name of the cable. |
| `serial_number` | str | Manufacturer serial number for the cable. |
| `diameter` | float \| None | Outer cable diameter in meters. |
| `strength_member` | str | Cable strength member material or construction. |
| `maximum_load` | float \| None | Maximum cable load in newtons. |
| `minimum_bend_radius` | float \| None | Minimum cable bend radius in meters. |
| `specification` | [ExternalResource](ExternalResource.qmd) \| None | External cable specification, datasheet, or product page. |
| `container` | [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd) \| [Cable](Cable.qmd) \| None | Optional containing physical asset, such as an enclosure, pipe, duct, or larger cable assembly. |
| `fiber_count` | int \| None | Number of fibers contained in the cable. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [References](References.qmd)

## References

- contained by [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd)
- contained by [Cable](Cable.qmd)

## Referenced By

- contained by from [Cable](Cable.qmd)
- uses from [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd)
- uses from [FiberSegment](FiberSegment.qmd)
